name: STG · AI · Webhook → AI Operator Tool Dispatcher · DHR
description: AI | Validates tool entitlement from Supabase, deducts tool-specific credits, dispatches to matching Launchpad tool webhook. Called by AI Operator Main Router. OWNER: Dhruv | p1:high | ai-powered | ENV: STG

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, allowed: false, tool_id: $json.tool_id, reason: $json.reason || 'tool_not_in_plan', upgrade_url: $vars.STRIPE_UPGRADE_URL || 'https://nova-ops.space/upgrade' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, tool_id: $('Code - Build Dispatch').first().json.tool_id, result: $json }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow_name: 'STG · AI · Webhook → AI Operator Tool Dispatcher · DHR', error_message: $json.error.message, error_node: $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted, execution_id: $execution.id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
